name: Morning Reflections Devotional Booklet - Volume 1
description: 52 weekly devotionals from the first year of Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM. Scripture, reflection, and prayer for each week. 80 pages, spiral-bound.

name: Morning Reflections Devotional Booklet - Volume 2
description: Year two collection: 52 devotionals on themes of grief, hope, and healing, drawn from Rebecca Price's radio broadcasts and hospital chaplaincy reflections.

name: Morning Reflections Devotional Booklet - Volume 3
description: Third annual collection. Focus on joy as a spiritual discipline. 52 weekly devotionals for Saturday mornings. Companion to the WGSP broadcast season 2021-2022.

name: Morning Reflections Tote Bag
description: Canvas tote bag with Morning Reflections sunrise logo and WGSP 1490 AM imprint. Natural canvas, 15x16 inches. Great for carrying your Bible, journal, and devotional booklet.

name: Morning Reflections Coffee Mug - Sunrise Edition
description: 11 oz ceramic mug with the Morning Reflections sunrise logo and the phrase 'Joy is a discipline.' Microwave and dishwasher safe. Perfect for 4:45 AM devotionals.

name: Morning Reflections Journal - Guided Edition
description: 180-page guided journal with weekly scripture prompts, morning pages template, and gratitude space. Designed for listeners of Morning Reflections with Rebecca. Linen cover.

name: Morning Reflections Sticker Pack
description: Set of 6 vinyl stickers featuring Morning Reflections quotes and sunrise motif. Waterproof and fade-resistant. Includes: 'Joy is a discipline,' 'Be still,' 'Memphis mornings.'

name: Advent Devotional Booklet 2025
description: 28-day Advent devotional for December 2025. Scripture, reflection, and prayer for each day of the season. Companion to the special Advent episodes of Morning Reflections on WGSP 1490 AM.

name: Morning Reflections Lapel Pin
description: Enamel lapel pin: sunrise logo with 'Morning Reflections' text below. 1.25 inches. Gold-tone setting. Ships with a backing card and is packaged in a small gift box.

name: Henri Nouwen Reading Bundle
description: Curated 3-book bundle recommended on Morning Reflections: The Wounded Healer, Reaching Out, and The Return of the Prodigal Son. Sourced via Midtown Pages, Memphis.

name: Howard Thurman Selected Works Bundle
description: Two-book bundle: Jesus and the Disinherited and Meditations of the Heart. Recommended by Rebecca Price on the Morning Reflections broadcast. Sourced via Midtown Pages.

name: Morning Reflections Show Bookmark Set
description: Set of 4 double-sided bookmarks featuring scripture verses, the Morning Reflections logo, and WGSP 1490 AM. Laminated card stock. Great for Bibles, devotional books, and journals.

name: Lenten Devotional Booklet 2026
description: 40-day Lenten devotional for the 2026 Lenten season. Themes: perseverance, surrender, and resurrection hope. Companion to the Lenten series on Morning Reflections with Rebecca.

name: Morning Reflections T-Shirt - Sunrise Logo
description: Unisex heavyweight cotton tee with large chest print: Morning Reflections sunrise logo. Available in S, M, L, XL, 2XL. Colors: cream and deep burgundy. Pre-shrunk.

name: Brené Brown Faith & Courage Bundle
description: Two-book bundle curated for Morning Reflections listeners: Daring Greatly and The Gifts of Imperfection by Brené Brown. Sourced via Midtown Pages, Cooper-Young, Memphis.
